response.objective_caption: A nighttime outdoor gathering centered on a dark-colored Mini Cooper with its circular headlights illuminated in the left foreground. Several people stand in the background on a grassy area near trees that are lit with green light. A person stands in the immediate foreground facing the vehicle. Red light glows from the rear of another vehicle visible on the right side of the frame. Multiple artificial light sources illuminate the scene from various angles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime car meet captured with amateur snapshot energy, featuring a Mini Cooper under extreme exposure extremes with blown-out blue-white headlights and deep crushed shadows. The frame exhibits clashing disharmony through aggressive neon-like blues, reds, and greens, alongside visible color inconsistency from mixed light sources. Background figures and foreground subjects suffer from bad or no details, with smeared, mushy textures and dissolved features that lack clear definition throughout the image.
